text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Look at this, Maruzen! There's a new
announcement on the bulletin board!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone just keeps achieving more
and more… It's like they say, "In the
ground carrots lie, but their leaves
always reach for the sky"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah… the runners at this academy
truly are the best of the best…

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You have the potential to fill up this whole
board by yourself with your achievements,
you know?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Maruzen?! No need to… exaggerate…

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: No, I mean it. I truly believe you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hold your head up high, Chiyo! You've got
a promising future ahead of you, and you're
cute to boot!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! D-Do you really think I'm… cute?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, even that was cute!
And don't you forget… I believe in you.
